# DrKhaleej

DrKhaleej is an SEO-first healthcare discovery and provider visibility platform for Oman.

DrKhaleej is the current public brand. DrMuscat is a previous project name and may still appear in legacy repository or infrastructure references.

Current public routes in this phase:
- /en/om
- /ar/om
- /en/om/doctors
- /ar/om/doctors
- /en/om/dental
- /ar/om/dental
- /en/om/centers
- /ar/om/centers
- /en/om/pharmacies
- /ar/om/pharmacies
- /en/om/hospitals
- /ar/om/hospitals
- /en/om/labs
- /ar/om/labs
- /en/om/offers
- /ar/om/offers
- /en/om/beauty
- /ar/om/beauty
- /en/om/pet-clinics
- /ar/om/pet-clinics
- /en/om/pet-shops
- /ar/om/pet-shops
- /en/om/services
- /ar/om/services
- /en/om/search
- /ar/om/search
- /en/om/for-providers
- /ar/om/for-providers

Crawler-facing files:
- /robots.txt
- /sitemap.xml

Provider data, listings, individual profiles, and programmatic location or specialty pages are not yet public in this phase unless explicitly listed above.

DrKhaleej does not claim MOH verification, MOH approval, ratings, reviews, booking availability, insurance acceptance, or license verification in this phase.

DrKhaleej does not offer AI diagnosis or a symptom checker in this phase.
